title: cyperus haspan f. coarctatus
intro: Cyperus haspan f. coarctatus, also known as the Narrow-leaved Sedge, is a plant species in the sedge family (Cyperaceae) characterized by its narrow, flat leaves and rhizomatous growth habit. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its diuretic, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties, derived from the essential oils and other bioactive compounds present in its roots and rhizomes. The health benefits of Cyperus haspan f. coarctatus include its ability to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and aid in digestion. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
